title: Premium Footage 50+ Clips
description:
This pack includes 50+ Premium, hand-picked S-Log3 clips filmed in XAVC S-I 4K, 10 bit 4:2:2. Perfect for color grading practice. 

Every clip has been trimmed to the exact in/out points I used in my edits — so you’re getting only the best moments. No scrubbing. No re-encoding. Just clean, production-ready footage.

This footage is not for commercial use. It is provided solely for personal, educational, and color-grading practicepurposes. Redistribution, resale, or inclusion in paid client work is strictly prohibited.

title: The Creator Bundle
description:
The Creator Bundle is our best-value pack, built for filmmakers and content creators who want maximum creative flexibility in one complete toolkit.

This bundle gives you a powerful, end-to-end toolkit that covers everything from color and motion, to typography and visual emphasis, all in one place.

If you want to move fast, stay consistent, and keep your edits looking intentional, then this is it!

title: The Adobe Bundle
description:
This bundle includes The GOAT LUT, The Candy LUT, Epic Titles and the Film Frame Transitions Pack. Four of my most popular filmmaking tools, combined to give your projects a cinematic, professional edge while saving big!

These are the exact creative tools I use on my own productions; from rich, stylized color grades to ready-to-drop motion titles and handcrafted drag-and-drop transitions.

Together, these digital assets will help you deliver bold, dynamic visuals that will elevate your edits and give your work that handcrafted, cinematic touch.

title: The Master Bundle
description:
From color to motion to layout this bundle is a complete drag-and-drop toolkit!

The Master Bundle pairs two versatile creative LUTs with my Impact Overlays + Transitions and Split Screen Mattes, so you can grade fast, cut with style, and design layouts that feel intentional.

title: Impact Overlays + Transitions Vol. 1
description:
50 handcrafted, drag-and-drop transitions plus a 40+ piece animated library to give your 16:9 edits bold motion, gritty texture, and cinematic polish; fast. 

These drag-and-drop overlay transitions give your edits bold motion, gritty texture, and cinematic polish in seconds; no plugins, no learning curve.

Aalternatively you can build your own looks from the included 40+ animated elements library for endless variations.

title: Epic Titles
description:
Create bold, modern, animated titles with this cinematic title pack for Adobe Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve.

Each title is built with professional typography, seamless animations, and precision timing so your edit feels polished the moment you drop it in. No complicated setup, just drag, drop, customize, and go.

title: Film Frame Transitions
description: Film Frame Transitions gives you over 50 handcrafted, drag-and-drop transitions for Adobe Premiere Pro,designed for speed, versatility, and maximum impact.

title: Split Screen Mattes Vol.1
description:
I’m proud to release this handcrafted Split Screen Mattes Vol. 1 a collection of digital framing tools designed to instantly give your footage a stylized, cinematic aesthetic.

Both styles are available in horizontal and vertical formats, giving you maximum flexibility no matter what platform or orientation you’re working in. 

These are the exact mattes I use in my own professional work—they’ve been designed to be simple, drag-and-drop tools that save you time while giving your footage an intentional, artful finish.

title: The Candy LUT
description:
After the success of the GOAT LUT, this is the next look I’ve been reaching for, the Candy LUT.

It gives you rich and bold colour withnatural skin tones.

I use it across music videos, fashion content, and commercial work where the image needs to feel polished but not over-processed.

title: The GOAT LUT
description:
This is the look! My go-to Creative LUT and signature color grade that has defined the style and emotion of so many music videos I’ve shot over the years.

Used on projects for major artists and record labels across the world, the GOAT LUT delivers that unmistakable punch. Bold, rich tones, and cinematic depth in every frame.

It just works. Indoors or outdoors, day or night, it gives every shot the same filmic polish I’ve trusted for years.
